entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for drought tolerance in India

entities.name: ICGV 91114
entities.description: An improved drought-tolerant groundnut variety developed by ICRISAT

entities.name: TMV 2
entities.description: An old groundnut variety that dominates production in Anantapur

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather causing water shortage

entities.name: ANANTAPUR
entities.description: A drought-prone district in Andhra Pradesh, India

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where Anantapur is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study is conducted

entities.name: FARMER-PARTICIPATORY VARIETAL SELECTION TRIALS
entities.description: A method used to identify suitable crop varieties through farmer involvement

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pods produced per unit area of groundnut

entities.name: YIELD VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of fluctuation in crop yield

entities.name: NET INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain generated from crop production

entities.name: DRYLAND TROPICS
entities.description: The broader geographical region characterized by dry conditions in the tropics

entities.name: CLIMATIC SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden environmental changes that negatively impact agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of crop varieties to withstand or recover from climatic stress
